label: Mid-Funnel Capture Layer Inaccessibility
description: Mid-funnel capture layers become inaccessible when agents bypass navigation under high attention dependency

causal_translation.trigger_text: Your model captures margin in the mid-funnel with high attention dependency (>50).
causal_translation.rule_text: Under full delegation, agents bypass mid-funnel discovery layers entirely.
causal_translation.shift_text: Your capture layer becomes structurally inaccessible.
causal_translation.effect_text: Effective margin reduced to 25% of baseline — capture layer structurally removed.
